Aspiring Automotive Engineer
01

About & Skills

Who I Am

I am a Mechanical Engineering student driven by a passion for automotive and motorsports engineering. My focus lies in vehicle dynamics, engine systems, and hands-on engineering projects.

I aim to build a career in high-performance automotive engineering and contribute to advanced vehicle technologies — from formula-style racecars to cutting-edge drone systems.

03

Projects

Hardware Build · 2023
DIY 3D Printer

Designed and built a functional FDM 3D printer from scratch. Showcased at a science & technology fair in February 2023. The build involved mechanical design, electronics integration, and motion calibration.

3D Printing Electronics Stepper Motors Hardware Build
Robotics · Personal Build
Soccer Bot

Handbuilt a 4-wheel drive robot with a distinctive wooden chassis and RC-grade off-road wheels. Designed for robot soccer competition, featuring a custom frame fabricated entirely from wood and aluminum brackets.

Robotics Fabrication RC Systems Mechanical Design
Aerospace · Team Project · 2026
Project PHANTOM

Co-developed a Fiber-Optic Anti-Jam Kamikaze hexacopter drone with 2 teammates. Assembled brushless motors, ESCs, and flight controller systems. Presented at a National Mechanical Engineering event.

Drone / UAV Fiber Optics Anti-Jam Systems Brushless Motors Team Build
04

Experience

Technical Member
Robot Mechatronics Association (RMA) — CUET

Active technical member involved in hosting and organizing robotics events, including the Robo Soccer competition. Responsible for technical setup, robot inspection, and event coordination.
